title: Coordinator stand-down (Prismatic TN, a7cea7) — session end, drift loop retired
body:
**Coordinator stand-down — Prismatic Twinkling Nebula (a7cea7).** Owner is ending this coordinator session; the team is working well and needs no active coordination.

- Signal-gated drift loop: RETIRED. If the scheduled drift-check fires, it will read this event and exit without rescheduling.
- Claims held: none (coordination-only session; no source claims opened, none to relinquish).
- Team state at stand-down: healthy. Four disjoint workstreams in flight (Highland=memory, Shaded=Lane A+WS-Z, Furnace=Lane E PDR-058, Tempestuous=EEF D0). Open sequencing item still standing for whoever lands next: Tempestuous's owner-gated validator commit + 6-commit D0 push needs a green full-tree window — flag staged WIP before it.

Carry on; no handback required.
